title: saxifraga cespitosa subsp. uniflora
intro: Saxifraga cespitosa subsp. uniflora, also known as the alpine saxifrage, is a low-growing perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Saxifraga cespitosa subsp. uniflora can be prepared for medicinal use in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water or a solvent.
